faq.title: Frequently asked questions about sewer work
faq.subtitle: Have a question? Browse the most common questions below or get in touch.

items.q: How quickly can you arrive in an emergency?
items.a: For urgent situations like blockages or flooding, we aim to be on site within 1 to 2 hours in Bilzen, Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren and surrounding areas in Limburg. We are reachable 24/7 for emergencies.

items.q: What does an unblocking cost on average?
items.a: The price depends on the type and severity of the blockage. Whether it's a blocked toilet, sink or shower that won't drain — use our online estimation tool for an indicative price, or request a free quote for an exact calculation.

items.q: My toilet is blocked, what can I do?
items.a: A blocked toilet is one of the most common issues. First try a plunger or hot water. Doesn't work? Then the blockage is likely deeper in the drain. Our technicians can unblock your toilet with professional equipment, often within the hour.

items.q: My sink or shower won't drain, what's the cause?
items.a: A blocked sink or shower that won't drain is usually caused by build-up of fat, hair or soap residue. Water coming back up the drain points to a blockage further down. We solve this quickly with high-pressure cleaning.

items.q: I smell sewer gas in the house — is that dangerous?
items.a: Sewer smells in the house can indicate a dry siphon, a damaged pipe or a poor connection to the sewer system. It's not immediately dangerous, but unpleasant and a sign of an underlying problem. A sewer camera inspection quickly reveals the cause.

items.q: What does a gurgling drain or drain flies mean?
items.a: A gurgling drain often points to a ventilation issue or a blockage deeper in the pipe. Drain flies are small insects that thrive on organic material in blocked or slow drains. Both are symptoms of a problem that needs professional inspection.

items.q: Do you also work weekends and holidays?
items.a: Yes, we are available 24/7 — including weekends and holidays. For emergencies you can always reach us by phone or WhatsApp.

items.q: Is a sewer camera inspection always needed?
items.a: Not always, but it's recommended for recurring blockages or when buying a property. It gives you a clear picture of the state of your sewer system.

items.q: How often should a septic tank be emptied?
items.a: On average we recommend emptying your septic tank every 2 to 4 years, depending on usage and tank size.

items.q: Do you also offer preventive maintenance?
items.a: Absolutely. We offer contracts for periodic cleaning and inspection in Bilzen, Hasselt and across Limburg, so problems are prevented before they arise.

septische-put-ledigen.title: Septic Tank Emptying in Limburg
septische-put-ledigen.description: Septic tank full? Riory empties, clears and cleans your septic tank in Bilzen, Hoeselt, Hasselt, Genk and Tongeren — 24/7 with fixed prices and specialised tanker trucks.
septische-put-ledigen.longDescription: A full septic tank always gives signs before things really go wrong: the drain runs slower, you smell a penetrating odour in the garden, or water comes back up. In the rural areas around Sint-Truiden, Borgloon, Wellen and Kortessem, almost every home has a septic tank — and many are already 20, 30 years old without ever having been emptied. That's asking for trouble. Riory is your specialist for emptying septic tanks in Bilzen, Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren and Hoeselt. With specialised tanker trucks, our team empties and cleans your tank quickly and cleanly. Our hoses reach up to 40 metres, so we don't need to drive over your lawn or driveway. We dispose of the sludge correctly in accordance with environmental legislation and always leave the area clean. Want to know how full your tank already is? Call us for an inspection — we'll take a look together.

wc-verstopt.title: Blocked Toilet in Limburg — Riory BV Solves It
wc-verstopt.description: Blocked toilet in Limburg? Riory BV is available 24/7 and on site within 2 hours in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen, Hoeselt and Sint-Truiden. Fixed prices, no demolition.
wc-verstopt.longDescription: A blocked toilet is usually easy to recognise: the toilet flushes slowly, water stays high, you hear gurgling sounds, or an unpleasant sewer smell rises. In the worst case, the toilet overflows and causes water damage. A blocked toilet is almost never a problem that resolves itself — waiting usually makes the blockage worse. At Riory BV we handle every blocked toilet professionally: drain auger, high-pressure cleaning and — if needed — camera inspection to pinpoint the exact cause. In Limburg we often see toilet blockages caused by wet wipes accidentally flushed, and by limescale build-up in older pipes in central Hasselt and Tongeren. We work without demolition, with a covered work area and fixed prices. Our technicians are available 24/7 and usually at your home within 2 hours.

faq.question: What should I avoid flushing to prevent blockages?
faq.answer: Never flush wet wipes, sanitary pads, tampons, condoms, cotton buds, cat litter or grease down the toilet. Even 'flushable' wipes don't dissolve and are a major cause of blockages.

keukenafvoer-verstopt.title: Blocked Kitchen Drain in Limburg — Riory BV
keukenafvoer-verstopt.description: Blocked kitchen drain in Limburg? Riory BV removes grease build-up quickly and thoroughly with high-pressure cleaning. Available 24/7 across Limburg.
keukenafvoer-verstopt.longDescription: A blocked kitchen drain almost always has the same cause: grease, food scraps and soap that build up over time into a hard layer inside the pipe. Typical signs are a slow-draining sink, gurgling sounds or an unpleasant smell from the drain. DIY remedies only help temporarily and can damage pipes. In apartments in Genk-Winterslag and central Hasselt we see grease blockages most often — the drain pipes are narrow and old, and small amounts of grease each day build up into a complete blockage. Riory BV professionally removes grease blockages with professional high-pressure cleaning — no chemicals, no demolition. Our technicians work cleanly, properly cover your kitchen, and give practical tips to prevent recurrence. Available 24/7 across Limburg.

faq.question: Why does my kitchen drain keep getting blocked?
faq.answer: The main cause is grease that solidifies on the pipe wall as it cools and traps food scraps. A thorough high-pressure clean removes the entire layer — a chemical unblocker does not.

faq.question: How quickly is Riory on site for a blocked sink?
faq.answer: For a blocked kitchen drain we are usually on site within 1 to 2 hours in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and Sint-Truiden. We are available 24/7.

faq.question: Can grease and food scraps really block my sewer?
faq.answer: Yes. Grease solidifies in the pipe and traps food scraps and soap. Over time this forms a hard 'grease plug' that can only be cleared with professional high-pressure equipment.

doucheputje-verstopt.title: Blocked Shower Drain in Limburg — Riory BV
doucheputje-verstopt.description: Blocked shower drain in Limburg? Riory removes hair and soap residue quickly. Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren and surrounding areas.
doucheputje-verstopt.longDescription: A blocked shower drain is mainly a nuisance: water pools, an unpleasant layer forms and eventually the bathroom starts to smell of sewage. The cause is almost always the same combination: hair, soap residue, shower gel and skin oil that together form a plug in or just below the trap. In family homes in Hasselt, Genk and Tongeren, the shower drain is one of the most commonly reported problems — especially in households with long hair. Riory BV professionally unblocks every shower drain: we dismantle the trap where needed, fully remove the blockage and flush the pipe through. No chemicals, no scratches on your shower floor. We work 24/7 across Limburg with fixed prices and are usually on site within 2 hours.

No more bad odours in the bathroom
No demolition — your bathroom stays intact

faq.question: What causes a blocked shower drain?
faq.answer: Almost always a combination of hair, soap residue and skin oil that together form a plug in the trap. A hair catcher can prevent many blockages, but existing plugs need to be removed professionally.

faq.question: Can I solve this myself with a chemical unblocker?
faq.answer: Chemical products only help temporarily and damage your pipes and trap over time. Mechanical removal by Riory is more durable and safer for your plumbing.

riool-verstopt.title: Blocked Sewer in Limburg — Riory BV
riool-verstopt.description: Blocked sewer in Limburg? Multiple drains blocked at once? Riory BV tackles it with a high-pressure jet + camera inspection. 24/7 across Limburg.
riool-verstopt.longDescription: When multiple drains run slowly at the same time — your toilet, shower and sink — the problem runs deeper: there's a blockage in the main sewer, not in an individual trap. Typical signs are gurgling sounds in other drains, water coming back up through the shower drain, or a strong sewer smell around the outdoor inspection points. A deep sewer blockage requires professional equipment. Riory BV first correctly diagnoses every blocked sewer in Limburg with camera inspection. In the Meuse region and in Tongeren we often see poplar and willow root intrusion growing into sewer pipes. In urban neighbourhoods of Hasselt and Genk, grease layers and limescale are the most common cause. After diagnosis, we remove the blockage with a powerful high-pressure jet — without excavation. You receive a report with footage and honest advice. Available 24/7 across Limburg.

faq.question: How do I know if my main sewer is blocked?
faq.answer: If multiple drains run slowly at the same time (toilet, shower, sink), or if water comes up through the shower drain when you flush, the blockage is in the main sewer — not in a single trap.

faq.question: Does my sewer need to be dug up to unblock it?
faq.answer: Not in 99% of cases. We insert the high-pressure jet through an existing inspection point and locate the problem with our camera. Excavation is only needed for serious breaks or subsidence.

lekkende-kraan.title: Leaking Tap in Limburg — Riory BV Repairs It
lekkende-kraan.description: Leaking tap in Limburg? Riory BV repairs it quickly and professionally. Available 24/7 across Limburg — Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen, Sint-Truiden.
lekkende-kraan.longDescription: A leaking tap may seem harmless, but a dripping tap quickly wastes hundreds of litres of water per month — and a leaking mixer tap under a sink can cause unnoticed water damage to your cabinet, floor or ceiling. In Limburg we often see this in homes built in the 1980s-90s in Hasselt, Genk and Sint-Truiden: taps that were never replaced and are now leaking due to worn rubber seals or limescale on the cartridge. Riory BV repairs every leaking tap quickly and cleanly. We identify the problem on site — seal, cartridge or the tap itself — and honestly advise whether repair or replacement is the best choice. Fixed prices, warranty on the work, and no unnecessary replacement if a simple seal will do. Available 24/7 across Limburg.
features: Leaking tap professionally repaired — no more wasted water
Seal, cartridge or entire tap replaced
Suitable for kitchen, bathroom and washbasin
Available 24/7 across Limburg
Fixed prices — warranty on work performed
Prevents water damage to cabinet, floor and ceiling
lekkende-kraan.metaDescription: Leaking tap in Limburg? Riory BV repairs it quickly and professionally. Available 24/7 across Limburg. ☎ +32 472 50 28 14
lekkende-kraan.h2Title: Repairing a leaking tap in Limburg

faq.question: How much water does a leaking tap waste?
faq.answer: A tap that drips every second quickly wastes 15 to 20 litres per day — over 5000 litres per year. A targeted repair pays for itself quickly.

faq.question: Can every tap be repaired or does it need replacing?
faq.answer: In many cases replacing a seal or cartridge is enough. For older taps, limescale or damaged parts, replacement is often more durable. Riory will advise you honestly on site.

faq.question: How quickly does Riory arrive for a leaking tap?
faq.answer: Usually within 1 to 2 hours in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen, Hoeselt and Sint-Truiden. For non-urgent repairs we can also schedule an appointment at a time that suits you.

lekkage-opsporen.title: Leak Detection in Limburg — Riory BV
lekkage-opsporen.description: Damp patches, mould or an unexplained high water bill? Riory traces hidden leaks in Limburg without demolition. Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and surrounding areas.
lekkage-opsporen.longDescription:
A hidden leak is deceptive. You see a damp patch on the wall, your water bill is suddenly much higher than usual, or you hear running water while all taps are closed. But where is the leak? In Limburg we see this problem often in older homes in Tongeren and Bilzen, where pipes from the 1960s-70s are gradually ageing, but also in newer apartments in Hasselt and Genk where a faulty connection only causes problems after years.

Riory BV traces every hidden leak in Limburg without unnecessary demolition. We use professional equipment — acoustic leak detection, thermal imaging camera and tracer gas — to pinpoint the leak exactly. This way our technician knows where the problem is before the first stone is broken. After detection you receive a clear report and honest advice for the repair.
features: Acoustic leak detection — hear the leak without demolition
Thermal imaging camera — making damp patches visible
Tracer gas for hard-to-reach pipes
Suitable for water, heating and sewer leaks
Clear report with exact leak location
Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and Hoeselt
Fixed, transparent prices — no surprises
lekkage-opsporen.metaTitle: Leak Detection Limburg | No Demolition | Riory
lekkage-opsporen.metaDescription: Hidden leak in Limburg? Riory traces leaks without demolition — acoustic, thermal or tracer gas. ✓ 24/7 ✓ Report ✓ Fixed price. Call now!
lekkage-opsporen.h2Title: Detecting a hidden leak in Limburg — Riory's approach

faq.question: How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Typical signs: a growing damp patch on a wall or ceiling, mould forming without a clear cause, a water bill that has suddenly risen without using more water, or the sound of running water while everything is turned off. If you notice one or more of these signs, leak detection is advisable.

faq.question: Does the floor need to be dug up or broken to detect a leak?
faq.answer: In 95% of cases, no. With acoustic detection, thermal imaging or tracer gas we locate the leak to within a centimetre — without breaking a single stone. Only after detection does the repairer know exactly where to work.

faq.question: What does leak detection cost in Limburg?
faq.answer: Riory works with fixed, transparent rates for leak detection. The price depends on the method used and the complexity. You know in advance what you'll pay — request an appointment or call +32 472 50 28 14.

dakgootreiniging.title: Gutter Cleaning in Limburg — Riory BV
dakgootreiniging.description: Blocked gutters in Limburg? Riory thoroughly cleans gutters and downpipes — for homeowners and property managers. Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and surrounding areas.
dakgootreiniging.longDescription:
In autumn, leaves, moss and twigs fill the gutters of homes across Limburg. In Hasselt-Kermt, Tongeren and the rural municipalities around Borgloon and Wellen, we see this every year: blocked gutters that no longer drain rainwater, which then overflows and causes damage to the facade, foundation or basement.

A blocked gutter may seem harmless but the consequences are not. Water running down the facade eventually penetrates the wall insulation. In winter, frozen gutters cause ice formation that physically damages the gutter. Riory BV thoroughly cleans gutters and downpipes across Limburg — for private homes, apartment buildings and property managers. We work at height with the right safety equipment, remove all leaves and sludge, and check that the downpipes drain freely to the rainwater tank or sewer.
features: Thorough cleaning of gutters and downpipes
Removal of leaves, moss, twigs and sludge
Checking drainage to rainwater tank or sewer
Suitable for all home types and apartment buildings
Safe working at height with professional equipment
Preventive annual maintenance possible
Available 24/7 — also for emergencies during flooding
dakgootreiniging.metaTitle: Gutter Cleaning Limburg | Blocked Gutter | Riory
dakgootreiniging.metaDescription: Blocked gutter in Limburg? Riory thoroughly cleans gutters and downpipes at height. ✓ Homeowners & property managers ✓ Fixed price ✓ 24/7. Call now!
dakgootreiniging.h2Title: Cleaning gutters in Limburg — for homeowners and property managers

faq.question: How often should a gutter be cleaned?
faq.answer: At least once a year, preferably in November after leaf fall. Homes under trees or with a flat roof may benefit from two cleanings per year — before and after the autumn season.

faq.question: What are the consequences of a blocked gutter?
faq.answer: Rainwater that cannot drain overflows the gutter edge and penetrates the facade, insulation or foundation. Over time this leads to damp damage, mould and costly repairs. Preventive cleaning is always cheaper than dealing with damage afterwards.

faq.question: Does Riory also work for apartment buildings and property managers?
faq.answer: Yes. Riory BV has experience with multi-storey buildings and apartment blocks in Hasselt, Genk and Tongeren. We arrange tailored appointments for property managers and provide a detailed report after every intervention.

rioolreparatie.title: Sewer Repair in Limburg — Riory BV
rioolreparatie.description: Broken, sunken or root-damaged sewer pipe in Limburg? Riory repairs sewers professionally — with or without excavation. Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and surrounding areas.
rioolreparatie.longDescription:
A sewer repair is different from unblocking. With a blockage, something is stuck in the pipe; with a repair, the pipe itself is damaged — broken, sunken, disconnected at a joint, or infiltrated by tree roots. In Limburg we see this often in older neighbourhoods of Tongeren and Bilzen, where concrete sewer pipes from the 1950s-60s are simply reaching the end of their lifespan. In gardens with poplars or willows, root intrusion is also a common cause.

Riory BV carries out sewer repairs across Limburg — from a single break repair to replacing an entire pipe segment. We always start with a camera inspection to precisely map the damage. Where possible we work without excavation using no-dig techniques such as relining. When digging is necessary, we work quickly, cleanly and leave the area tidy. You always receive a report with before and after footage.
features: Camera inspection first — exact damage mapped before work begins
Break, crack or disconnection professionally repaired
Root intrusion mechanically removed and pipe repaired
No-dig relining where possible — no excavation
Full pipe replacement if needed
Report with before and after footage
Available 24/7 across Limburg
rioolreparatie.metaTitle: Sewer Repair Limburg | Break, Subsidence & Roots | Riory
rioolreparatie.metaDescription: Broken or sunken sewer in Limburg? Riory repairs professionally — camera inspection, no-dig relining or pipe replacement. ✓ 24/7 ✓ Fixed price. Call now!
rioolreparatie.h2Title: Sewer repair in Limburg — break, subsidence and root intrusion

faq.question: How do I know if my sewer is broken and not just blocked?
faq.answer: Recurring blockages in the same spot, sinking ground in the garden above the sewer line, a permanent sewer smell or water rising to the surface are typical signs of a break or subsidence. A camera inspection confirms the diagnosis.

faq.question: Does a sewer repair always require digging?
faq.answer: Not always. For smaller cracks or disconnections we can repair the damage via relining — a technique where a new inner pipe is installed without digging. Only severe subsidence or complete breaks require excavation.

faq.question: What does a sewer repair cost in Limburg?
faq.answer: The price depends on the nature of the damage, the depth of the pipe and the chosen repair method. Riory always gives an honest proposal after the camera inspection. Call +32 472 50 28 14 or request an appointment.

rioolvliegjes.title: Drain Flies in Limburg — Tracing & Solving the Cause | Riory
rioolvliegjes.description: Bothered by small flies in the bathroom, kitchen or basement in Limburg? Drain flies indicate an open sewer connection. Riory traces the source and solves it. Available 24/7.
rioolvliegjes.longDescription:
You see small, dark flies in the bathroom, around the sink or in the basement. They're slow, keep coming back and chemical products only help temporarily. These are almost certainly drain flies — also known as sewer gnats or moth flies. They live and breed in the organic sludge that builds up in blocked or slow drains, and emerge through open connections or cracks in your sewer pipe.

In Limburg we see drain flies most often in older homes in Tongeren, Bilzen and central Hasselt, where drain pipes are already decades old and small cracks or open trap connections let the infestation in. A chemical treatment fights the adult flies but not the breeding ground. Riory BV tackles it at the source: we trace the open connection or damaged pipe with camera inspection or smoke detection, repair the fault, and thoroughly clean the affected drains so the breeding ground disappears.
features: Cause traced with camera inspection or smoke detection
Open sewer connection or crack professionally repaired
Thorough cleaning of affected drains
Breeding ground in sludge fully removed
Not a temporary chemical treatment but a permanent solution
Available 24/7 in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen and Hoeselt
rioolvliegjes.metaTitle: Drain Flies Limburg | Tracing & Solving | Riory
rioolvliegjes.metaDescription: Drain flies in your bathroom or kitchen in Limburg? Riory traces the source and solves it permanently. ✓ Camera inspection ✓ 24/7 ✓ Fixed price. Call now!
rioolvliegjes.h2Title: Tackling drain flies in Limburg — permanently, not temporarily

faq.question: Are drain flies dangerous?
faq.answer: Drain flies don't bite and don't transmit diseases, but they're a clear signal that something is wrong with your sewer pipe — an open connection, a crack or a heavily fouled drain. It's best to tackle the problem as soon as possible.

faq.question: Why do they keep coming back after a chemical treatment?
faq.answer: Chemical products kill the adult flies but not the larvae in the sludge, and they don't repair the open connection through which new flies enter from outside. Only a mechanical approach to the breeding ground and sealing the opening provides a permanent solution.

faq.question: How quickly can Riory be on site?
faq.answer: Usually within 1 to 2 hours in Hasselt, Genk, Tongeren, Bilzen, Hoeselt and Sint-Truiden. Drain flies aren't an emergency but they are annoying — we quickly schedule an appointment at a time that suits you.
